name: club_access_toggle
description: Host-only club access toggles (parity E8). From the Feed → Clubs pill → ClubHomeScreen of the hosted 'Riverside Archers' mock club, archer flips Visibility (Public → Private) and Join Policy (Open → Invite-only) via the ACCESS section's host-only buttons, then re-enters the club and asserts the toggles persisted. iOS oracle: ClubHomeView.swift (E8 host-only block). Status DRAFT: the access toggle rows don't carry stable testTags yet — flow drives by the CTA button labels ('MAKE PRIVATE' / 'INVITE-ONLY' / 'MAKE PUBLIC' / 'OPEN') which render identically across platforms.
